description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 40-43.

Level 24

Archdruid’s Resilience

When you reach 24th level, you become resistant to cold and fire damage, both in your true form and in your Wild Shape. Additionally, whenever you finish a long rest, choose one other damage type among the following: acid, lightning, or thunder. You become resistant to that damage type in all your forms until you choose another type upon finishing a long rest.

Rejuvenating Recovery

Also at 24th level, when you use the Recover action, you regain a use of your Wild Shape feature and are cleansed of one harmful condition or magical effect of 7th level or lower currently afflicting you.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
